name: Kim Thamert
bio: Kim serves as MH Construction's HR Director, leading people operations with disciplined systems that strengthen hiring, onboarding, retention, and team accountability. She helps keep workforce planning aligned with company standards so teams can execute safely, consistently, and with clear expectations.
careerHighlights: Leads people operations with structured hiring and onboarding workflows.
Improves team retention through clear expectations and consistent follow-through.
Supports leadership with practical HR systems and policy discipline.
Strengthens workforce readiness through proactive personnel planning.
funFact: Kim is known for turning complex personnel challenges into clear, actionable plans.
